heroTagline: Accounting trained. UX focused. I bring structured thinking and precision to design that works for real people.
aboutQuote: First make it functional, then fast, and then, pretty.
aboutBio:
Four years in accounting taught me that clear structure, attention to detail, and understanding how processes affect people are not just professional skills — they are design skills. That realisation led me to UX.

I am currently completing the Google UX Design Certificate and preparing for a professional bachelor's degree in Interaction Design starting in 2026. Every project I take on is grounded in research first, iteration second, and visual polish only after the behaviour works.
